name: BIGO Ads
description: Developer monetization SSP from BIGO with SDK integration, server bidding and mediation support for mobile apps.

seo.title: BIGO Ads — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: BIGO Ads: Developer monetization SSP from BIGO with SDK integration, server bidding and mediation support for mobile apps.

when_to_use: Monetizing mobile apps via BIGO SSP with server-side bidding
Adding BIGO Live and IMO audience demand to mediation stack
Server bidding integration for mobile publishers seeking APAC demand
Banner and interstitial monetization for Android apps in Asia Pacific

pros: Direct demand from BIGO's owned apps
cons: Outside APAC, demand density drops fast
Brand safety concerns in some verticals
review.verdict: Useful APAC SSP with unique demand, but secondary choice for global English-first publishers.
review.best_for: Publishers with significant APAC traffic, especially SEA and Greater China users.
review.not_for: Western brand-safe publishers or anyone needing IAB-grade compliance proof.
